allow: PowerShell($mvn = \(Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($mvn\) { "mvn: $\($mvn.Source\)" } else { "mvn NOT found" }; $jc = \(Get-Command javac -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($jc\) { javac -version 2>&1 } else { "javac NOT found" })

Bash(python -c "import yaml,sys; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('groups.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); g=d['groups']; print\('OK — groupes:', len\(g\)\); import json; [print\(' ', k, '| parents:', v.get\('parents'\), '| perms:', len\(v.get\('permissions',[]\)\)\) for k,v in g.items\(\)]")
